acceptance_criteria.description: TypeScript compiles with no errors including test files
All Ring 0 spec validator and cross-level validator tests pass
Tests provide comprehensive coverage of all R0-S and CL-S rules
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify: (1) spec-validator.test.ts has at least one test per R0-S rule (R0-S01 through R0-S14), testing both the passing and failing case. (2) cross-level.test.ts has at least one test per CL-S rule (CL-S01 through CL-S04), testing both passing and failing cases. (3) Fixtures in tests/fixtures/specs/ include a valid spec (JSON + Markdown) and the tests construct invalid variants programmatically or via fixture mutation. (4) Tests use vitest (describe/it/expect). (5) No tests depend on external services or file system reads at runtime — all data is inline or from fixture imports. PASS if all five hold. FAIL if any rule lacks both a positive and negative test case.
